'''Nystao''' was the ruling city on [[Honoghr/Legends|Honoghr]] spread on the northern face of the planet. It was located at the center of a region known as the [[Clean Lands]], as the remaining surface of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was contaminated with hybrid [[Kholm-grass|''kholm''-grass]] seeded by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Nystao was the home of the [[Grand Dukha]] where the clan representative of the [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] convened occasionally.

{{City-stub}}
